summary: Excellent matrix recording of a magical Greek show with pristine sound and a standout Morning Dew performance
review: The UltraMatrix capture delivers crystal‑clear audio that lets the listener hear every nuance of what reviewers call one of the prettiest Greek shows ever. The band was in fabulous form, with Bill Kreutzmann’s drumming “shepherding” the set and Jerry Garcia delivering a soaring vocal on Morning Dew, making this both a great performance and a superb recording.

ai_rating.rationale: A single detailed 5‑star review praises both the musical performance (exceptional band form, highlighted Morning Dew) and the recording quality (pure, great matrix sound), leading to a high combined rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer describes the recording as pure and great; UltraMatrix source implies a clean blend of soundboard and audience with no noted flaws.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The concert is portrayed as magical and tightly paced, with Bill’s drumming keeping the “train” on time and the band delivering a cohesive, high‑energy performance.

band_member_comments.Jerry: His voice was strong and moving on Morning Dew, one of the best vocal performances of the ’80s according to the reviewer.
band_member_comments.Drums: Bill Kreutzmann is praised for “shepherding” the show and keeping everything running smoothly.
